import axios from"axios";const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL;function authHeaders(){const token=localStorage.getItem("token");return{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)};}// Audit endpoints
export async function runAudit(url){const res=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/api/audit"),{url},{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}export async function listAudits(){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/audit"),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data.audits;}export async function getAuditDetail(id){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/audit/").concat(id),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}// AI Test endpoints
export async function runAITest(url,query){const res=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/api/ai-test"),{url,query},{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}export async function listAITests(){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/ai-test"),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data.tests;}export async function getAITestDetail(id){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/ai-test/").concat(id),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}// Monitor endpoints
export async function addMonitor(url){const res=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/api/monitor"),{url},{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}export async function listMonitors(){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/monitor"),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data.pages;}export async function refreshMonitor(pageId){const res=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/api/monitor/").concat(pageId,"/refresh"),{},{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}export async function getPageChanges(pageId){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/monitor/").concat(pageId,"/changes"),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data.changes;}export async function deleteMonitor(pageId){await axios.delete("".concat(API_URL,"/api/monitor/").concat(pageId),{headers:authHeaders()});}// Reports endpoints
export async function getOverview(){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/reports/overview"),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}export async function getTrends(url){const params=url?"?url=".concat(encodeURIComponent(url)):"";const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/reports/trends").concat(params),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}export async function getCompetitors(){const res=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL,"/api/reports/competitors"),{headers:authHeaders()});return res.data;}
